meaning: United States Postal Service 美国邮政管理局
examples: USPS has sophisticated emergency plans for natural disasters.
The United States Postal Service (USPS) suspended mail delivery.
Even the United States Postal Service(USPS) suspended mail delivery.
The USPS was never intended to be a profit mill for the federal government.
Otherwise, taxpayers could ultimately find themselves back on the budgetary hook for USPS operations.
